meaning: vt.恐吓,威胁,预示(危险),似有发生或来临的可能,可能来临
examples: We are reproducing ourselves at such a rate that our numbers threaten the ecology of the planet.
Humans also threaten carnivorous plants in other ways.
You could threaten to replace all their tunes with white noise.
Glaciers also began expanding on Greenland, soon to threaten Norse settlements on the island.
Thus, to ignore their problems is to threaten the health of a great many Americans.
